data.title: SlowMist Cosine responded to Jupiter's collection of evidence of employees' illegal behavior: the owner of a certain address should know what happened
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist founder Yu Xian posted on the X platform that the address doodo...kqg7 "tested" the following three CAs one after another immediately after Argentine President Milley tweeted. Ordinary people may think that there is nothing to question, but what is interesting is that these three CAs actually come from the same person (the relationship cannot be directly seen on the chain, and our various data are cross-linked). So I said that the owner of this address should know what happened, maybe he was just performing his routine test in Jupiter. 
ARG CA: ZRfYvM1aNWyqAbhaN1jGmgwBgbed6ah6Xo2qFZNGaPQ 
LIBRA CA:ApxSjBnuVF18mrWFm3PveMZseCJoLETmVN8wvfU9hTwb (yes, it is not the real $LIBRA) 
SPL Token CA: Bo9jh3wsmcC2AjakLWzNmKJ3SgtZmXEcSaW7L2FAvUsU (yes, it is the real $LIBRA) Cosine said that he posted the above post because Jupiter's tweet mentioned: "If there is evidence that Jupiter employees have leaked information or engaged in other sniping behavior, please contact us directly. If we find that a team member is operating with non-public information, we will take quick and decisive action."

data.title: Viewpoint: ETH/BTC exchange rate may have bottomed out, and a reversal will occur if it breaks through the monthly high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Aran Hawker, CEO of crypto trading automation platform CoinPanel, said: "ETH's recent price action is not an outperformance, but more like catching up with what it should be. Some traders may have rotated back to ETH from SOL, but there is no obvious trend shift or structural change. Any obvious outperformance may be wiped out by the next major market trend." LMAX Group market strategist Joel Kruger is more optimistic. He said the current market may be a sign that ETH has ended its multi-year downward trend against BTC. "There is evidence that after a downward trend since 2021, ETH may finally want to form a major bottom against BTC. We believe that it is very important to keep a close eye on the current monthly high of the ETH/BTC exchange rate and break above to promote the prospect of a reversal." (CoinDesk)

data.title: BNB falls below 650 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that BNB fell below 650 USDT and is currently trading at 648.68 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 3.41%.

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 37, Marking a 2 Point Shift
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 37, reflecting a decrease of 2 points compared to the previous day. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization. Over the past 90 days, 37 of these altcoins have outperformed Bitcoin in terms of price growth. The CMC Altcoin Season Index is used to determine whether the current cryptocurrency market is in an altcoin-dominated season. It is based on the performance of the top 100 altcoins relative to Bitcoin over the past 90 days.

data.title: Head of Base Protocol: The only way for the industry to get out of trouble depends on long-term builders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jesse Pollak, head of Base Protocol, said in response to the recent celebrity Meme coin incident: "In a few days, the same people will come back to sell us the same garbage, slightly changed packaging (new celebrities, new legitimacy, etc.). The only way to get this industry out of trouble is to let people with long-term ideas create a better future. It depends on ourselves."

data.title: BNB Drops Below 650 USDT with a 3.62% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2025, 06:32 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 650 USDT and is now trading at 649.27002 USDT, with a narrowed 3.62% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Sam Altman Seeks Input On Next Open-Source Model
data.description: According to Foresight News, Sam Altman has initiated a poll regarding his next open-source project. He is seeking feedback on whether to develop a very small O3-mini level model that requires GPU operation or to create the best possible model suitable for mobile devices. The poll aims to gather insights on which option would be more beneficial for users.

data.title: Binance Named 'Best Crypto App' at Sensor Tower APAC Awards 2024
data.description: Binance has been awarded the title of “Best Crypto App” at the Sensor Tower APAC Awards 2024, further cementing its leadership in the cryptocurrency sector. Binance stands as the sole crypto app recognized in this category. The Sensor Tower APAC Awards honor top-performing apps based on key metrics such as downloads, in-app purchases, active users, and user reviews. Binance has seen significant growth, particularly in Asia, as Bitcoin reached new all-time highs in 2024. The platform boasts over 225 million downloads and maintains an impressive 4.8-star average rating. With $150 billion in assets under management and over $100 trillion in trading volumes since 2017, Binance remains a dominant force in the crypto market, offering an all-in-one solution for trading, staking, earning, and learning about digital assets. “With Bitcoin's price reaching new highs in 2024, Binance, the leading global app in the cryptocurrency category, saw its downloads soar once again. It stands out as the premier all-in-one crypto solution for trading, staking, earning, and learning,” said Donny Kristianto, Principal Market Insights Manager at Sensor Tower APAC Awards.

data.title: HYPE briefly broke through 27 USDC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Hyperliquid market data shows that HYPE briefly broke through 27 USDC and is now at 26.848 USDC. 
Earlier news, Hyperliquid officially announced that the HyperEVM mainnet is now online.

data.title: Elon Musk Discusses Open Sourcing Grok3 in Live Broadcast
data.description: According to Odaily, Elon Musk recently addressed questions about the open sourcing of Grok3 during a live broadcast. He stated that the previous version would be open-sourced when the next version is released. Musk indicated that once Grok3 becomes stable, which may take several months, Grok2 will be made available as open source.
